title: Uniswap - Open App
meta_description: uniswap routes you to the official app for wallet-based token swaps, quote review, and onchain execution.
hero_h2: Swap tokens directly from your wallet
hero_lead: Uniswap connects your wallet to an onchain exchange interface for quoting token routes, reviewing price impact, and submitting swaps through the official app.
what_is: Uniswap is a suite of onchain protocols for decentralized token exchange, with automated market maker contracts that hold liquidity and execute swaps. The official developer documentation covers protocol versions, routing, and related infrastructure.

how.d: Use the launch button to go to app.uniswap.org, then verify the domain before connecting a wallet.
Select a supported wallet and network; never enter a seed phrase into any website.
Choose input and output tokens, enter an amount, and review the quoted route, slippage, and price impact.
Approve tokens only when needed, then sign the swap transaction from your wallet.

points.p: You keep custody while your wallet handles approvals and final transaction signing.
The interface can route across supported protocol paths; developers can review integration options in the trading documentation.
Swaps use smart contracts and onchain settlement; ethereum.org explains how dapps connect wallets to contracts.

faq.a: It is used to swap crypto tokens through onchain liquidity pools and routing while the connected wallet signs transactions.
The official action URL is app.uniswap.org; this page is a routing and education page, not the app itself.
No. The interface connects to your wallet; approvals and swaps are transactions you review and sign from that wallet.
The v4 deployments page lists current contract addresses by network, including Ethereum and multiple L2 or EVM networks.

faq.q: How do I verify uniswap contracts?
faq.a: Use official deployment docs for mapping and compare Ethereum mainnet addresses on Etherscan before interacting directly with contracts.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify app.uniswap.org before connecting. Educational content only, not financial advice.
